faqs.question: How long does drain fly treatment take in Glendale?
faqs.answer: Most drain fly treatments in Glendale homes and businesses take 1-2 hours depending on the severity of the infestation and number of affected drains. Our technicians will inspect all potential breeding sites, treat drains with specialized solutions, and provide prevention recommendations to ensure long-term results.

faqs.question: What causes drain flies in Glendale homes?
faqs.answer: Drain flies thrive in the organic matter that builds up in drains, pipes, and sewage systems. In Glendale, older plumbing systems, infrequently used drains in basements, and moisture accumulation are common causes. They breed rapidly in the gelatinous film inside drains, making professional treatment necessary for complete elimination.

faqs.question: Are drain fly treatments safe for my family and pets?
faqs.answer: Yes, our drain fly treatments use EPA-approved products that are safe for families and pets when applied by licensed professionals. We focus on targeted treatments in drain areas and use bio-enzymatic solutions that break down organic matter where drain flies breed, minimizing chemical exposure while maximizing effectiveness.
